name: Olympus Base
advisory: Solar Flare Alert: High UV index. Stay indoors between 0600 and 1400 Sols.

name: Acidalia Hub
advisory: Dust Storm incoming. Secure all pressurized rovers and toggle static shields.

name: Valles Biodome
advisory: Atmospheric pressure stable. Enjoy the green sector walk paths.

name: Utopia Plains
advisory: Subsurface ice mining operation active. Watch out for heavy machinery traffic.

name: Gale Labs
advisory: Fine particulate warning. Service your spacesuit filters before exiting the airlock.

name: Hellas Deep Outpost
advisory: CO2 frost sublimation occurring. Check external seal integrity immediately.

name: Chryse Station
advisory: High wind speeds detected. Secure all loose solar array brackets.

name: Promethei Station
advisory: Extreme cold event. Thermal grid running at 95% capacity. Limit external exposure.

name: Elysium Dome
advisory: Artificial ionosphere maintenance scheduled. Minor comms static expected.

name: Tharsis Foundry
advisory: Geothermal venting in Sector 4. Reroute all automated delivery drones.

name: Syrtis Tech Sector
advisory: Dark basalt terrain absorbency causing minor localized thermal updrafts.

name: Noachis Heritage City
advisory: Old crater rim rockslides reported. Stay clear of the western perimeter wall.

name: Arcadia Hydro-Plant
advisory: Water vapor extraction pipelines operating at peak pressure. Routine testing.

name: Amazonis Outpost
advisory: Dust devil activity spike. Automated rovers must switch to safe-park protocol.

name: Borealis Refinery
advisory: Polar night protocol active. Secondary backup battery bank tests underway.
